name: Fruit Salsa Sundaes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Soften tortillas according to package directions.
3. Press each tortilla into an ungreased custard cup.
4. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until crisp, then set aside to cool.
5. Combine peaches, strawberries, sugar, ginger, and lime peel; mix gently until well blended.
6. Assemble by removing tortillas from the custard cups.
7. Place each tortilla shell on a dessert plate and fill with 1 scoop of vanilla ice cream.
8. Spoon equal portions of fruit salsa over the top of the ice cream.
9. Garnish with mint sprigs if desired.
